name: Educational Bus Trnsprtn Inc
principals: John Corr Jr. (CEO, The Trans Group)
Sean Corr (President, Educational Bus Transportation - 3rd generation)
recent_news: Sean Corr (3rd-generation) named President of Educational Bus Transportation; Trans Group operates 1,300+ vehicles across NY; family-owned platform with no PE involvement noted as of 2024-2025.
fit_notes: Largest sub of family-owned Trans Group (~861 power units at EBT alone, 1,300+ across group). 3rd-generation succession recently executed (Sean Corr president), so near-term sale less likely; would be a platform-scale add rather than a small tuck-in. Strong NY/Long Island district book that complements Summit's NE footprint.

name: Little Richie Bus Svc Inc
owner_or_parent: Logan Bus Company family of companies (Lorinda Logan)
districts_or_customers: NYC public schools (Bronx, Queens, Brooklyn coverage)
recent_news: Logan family of companies (Logan Bus, Little Richie, Little Linda, Little Lisa, Grandpas, Lorinda, Lorissa, Bobby's) grew rapidly after absorbing Atlantic Express buses post-2013 bankruptcy; ~2,400 buses and ~25% of NYC routes across the group; NYC awarded 3-year contract extension.
fit_notes: Sub-entity of the Logan/Lorinda family roll-up, the dominant private NYC special-needs operator. Not a clean standalone tuck-in - Little Richie is one of 8+ sister cos sharing the 97-14 Atlantic Ave Ozone Park yard. A deal would realistically be for the whole Logan platform (~2,400 buses). 2nd-generation owner (Lorinda) is younger and actively expanding; succession signal low.

name: Golden Arrow Bus Svc
recent_news: Could not confirm an active US school-bus operator named 'Golden Arrow Bus Service' at 1041 Connecticut St, Imperial Beach, CA 91932. The gabs.net domain in the source record maps to Golden Arrow Bus Services in South Africa (not a US school-bus contractor). State field 'MO' and Imperial Beach CA address conflict, suggesting a data-quality issue in the source list.
fit_notes: Cannot validate this as a real US tuck-in candidate. Address (Imperial Beach CA), listed state (MO), and website (gabs.net = South African operator) are inconsistent. South Bay Union School District (Imperial Beach) does not publicly list Golden Arrow as a contractor. Recommend deprioritizing pending source verification.

name: G G & C Bus Co
owner_or_parent: Landmark Student Transportation, Inc. (Aurora, ON; majority owned by Connor, Clark & Lunn Infrastructure since Jan 2022)
principals: Original founders (1967): Bill Good, Wendell Gower, William Clark (legacy)
John Lenzner (prior owner 2004-2015, sold to Landmark)
recent_news: Landmark Student Transportation acquired GG&C from John Lenzner in late 2015; CC&L Infrastructure took majority stake in Landmark in January 2022. GG&C continues operating under its brand from Washington PA, Meadville PA, and Elyria OH.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in candidate - already owned by Landmark Student Transportation, an institutional/infra-backed (CC&L Infrastructure) competitor consolidator. Source list's Lewis Center OH address and Fleming.kyschools.us website are data errors; real footprint is PA/OH. Track as competitor benchmark rather than target.

name: L T Transportation
recent_news: Could not independently corroborate L T Transportation as a Baltimore school-bus contractor. The 2552 Woodbrook Ave address is publicly listed as 'C & T' bus charter & rental in West Baltimore - possibly a related/successor entity. Not listed on BCPS or Baltimore City Schools approved-contractor rosters in search results.
fit_notes: Source record is messy: state listed 'NY' but address is Baltimore MD; the address resolves publicly to 'C&T' charter/rental, not 'L T Transportation'. If real, this would be a sub-scale (~47 employees, ~$3M est. revenue) owner-operated charter/school operation - possible micro tuck-in if Summit is targeting MD/Baltimore expansion, but needs human verification (call Richard Calloway, check MD SOS filings) before pursuing.
